stemHtml: A person in custody is being transported on board a commercial flight. Which action must be undertaken?

options.a: The commander should apply the procedures for people in custody according to the operator
options.c: The person in custody should be allocated a seat next to an emergency exit, to facilitate their evacuation from the aircraft
options.d: Inform the passengers seated next to the person in custody so that they can assist in case the person in custody becomes aggressive
